name: Available Beds
query:
SELECT
    bm.name as "Bed:Link/Bed Master:120",
    bm.room as "Room:Link/Room Master:120",
    bm.block as "Block:Link/Block Master:120",
    blk.camp as "Camp:Link/Camp Master:120",
    bm.bed_type as "Bed Type::110",
    bm.status as "Status::100"
FROM `tabBed Master` bm
INNER JOIN `tabBlock Master` blk ON blk.name = bm.block
WHERE bm.status = 'Available'
    AND (%(camp)s = '' OR blk.camp = %(camp)s)
ORDER BY blk.camp, bm.block, bm.room
